original_abstract: This study explores the potential of the Merdeka Mengajar platform in supporting teacher professional development and the integration of technology in vocational education at SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto, as well as understanding teachers' perceptions and experiences in using the platform. Adopting a qualitative approach, this research investigates how the platform contributes to improving educational quality through the development of teaching skills, collaborative learning, and the use of digital resources. Findings indicate that Merdeka Mengajar facilitates access to a diverse range of learning resources, allowing teachers to enrich teaching content and adopt more interactive and innovative teaching methods, which align with the needs of the modern job market. The study also highlights challenges faced, including difficulties in integrating technology into the existing curriculum and limitations of technological infrastructure. Nonetheless, the overall perception of teachers towards this platform is positive, with many emphasizing its benefits in enhancing student engagement and enriching their learning experiences. This research underscores the importance of ongoing support and technical training for teachers to optimize the use of the platform and suggests better coordination between schools, platform managers, and teachers to overcome existing barriers. In conclusion, the Merdeka Mengajar platform offers significant opportunities to enhance the quality of vocational education through teacher professional development and technology integration. With a holistic and strategic approach, the use of this platform can be more effective, enriching students' learning experiences and preparing them with relevant skills for the future.
humanized_abstract: The aim of this study is to investigate the role of Merdeka Mengajar in conducting Teacher Professional Development and integrating technology in SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto so as to analyze teacher’s perceptions and experiences using the platform of Merdeka Mengajar in accordance with the educational quality improvement by means of increasing the teacher’s pedagogic competence, collaboration between teacher and student, and using technology for learning resources. This study employs a qualitative approach. In accordance with the purpose of this study, the researchers analyze several things related to SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto teachers’ perceptions on the role of Merdeka Mengajar platform which turns out to be able to access numerous learning materials so that they are able to enrich teaching materials which enable them to deliver their materials more attractively as well as the innovations adopted in the modern era, yet still have difficulties in incorporating technology into the teaching materials and sometimes experiencing network failure. As to whether or not the SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu teachers found Merdeka Mengajar beneficial for improving students’ engagement and quality of learning, the SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu teachers on the whole stated that the activities they carried out in Merdeka Mengajar platforms are effective in enhancing students’ engagement and quality of learning. Consequently, this study recommends a series of further assistance given to teachers for utilizing technology optimally, as well as collaboration between schools and Merdeka Mengajar, and between managers of the Merdeka program and teachers. Keywords—Teacher professional development, technology in vocational schools, Merdeka Mengajar initiative This program is very efficient for us to enhance the quality of learning and also for assisting teachers in performing the duty of teaching the students; thereby increasing the teacher’s pedagogic competence which is needed by vocational teachers in this era, fostering collaboration between teacher and student, and also in making use of various sources of learning materials located in technology platform which can increase the innovativeness of vocational teachers in handling educational materials, and increase students’ engagement and quality of learning.
